# TrustFlow Frontend

React + Vite UI for TrustFlow AI.

## Responsibilities

- Project creation and review workflows
- Knowledge Base upload screen
- Review queue and status actions
- Export UX

## Run (from `frontend/`)

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

Vite runs on the first free local port (commonly `8080+` in this workspace).

## Backend dependency

Frontend expects backend API at:

- `http://localhost:3000`

Make sure backend is running before using upload/review/export flows.

## Full docs

See repository root README for end-to-end setup and troubleshooting.
